basic_details.job_title: IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Assistant General Manager, Deputy General Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL), Govt. of India Undertaking
basic_details.post_name: Assistant General Manager (Grade C) & Deputy General Manager (Grade D)
basic_details.job_location: Anywhere in India (including foreign postings as per requirement)
basic_details.short_information: India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL) has published the Assistant General Manager (AGM - Grade C) and Deputy General Manager (DGM - Grade D) Recruitment Notification 2026 on 08 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 09 posts of AGM (Grade C) and 06 posts of DGM (Grade D) on a regular basis across various disciplines. Eligible Indian citizens with the required professional qualifications and post-qualification experience can apply. Applications must be submitted offline by post. The last date for receipt of applications is 08 June 2026. Candidates can access the official no

qualification.details: Age Limit (as on 30.04.2026) | Educational Qualification & Experience (Summary) | For AGM (Grade C): | Minimum 12 years post-qualification experience (out of which minimum 7 years in relevant domain). Relevant professional qualifications (CA, CMA, MBA, BE/B.Tech, etc.) as per discipline. Last drawn position should be equivalent to Scale III or Grade B / E4-E5 level. | For DGM (Grade D): | Minimum 16 years post-qualification experience (out of which minimum 11 years in relevant domain). Relevant professional qualifications (CA, CMA, MBA, BE/B.Tech, etc.) as per discipline. Last drawn position should be equivalent to Scale IV or Grade C / E5-E6 level. | Detailed discipline-wise eligibility (Risk Management, IT, CISO, Forex, Finance & Accounts, Project Finance, etc.) is available in the official notifications.

vacancy_details.Discipline: Project Finance / Sustainable Finance / Credit Monitoring etc.

selection_process: Selection will be done through shortlisting of applications based on eligibility criteria followed by Personal Interview. Final selection will be based on performance in the Interview
subject to verification of documents and medical fitness.
how_to_apply: Candidates must fill the application form, sign it, and send it along with self-attested copies of all relevant documents by ordinary post / speed post only to the registered address of IIFCL. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Documents to be sent along with Application:
important_instructions: Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Applications received after the last date will not be considered. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All future communications will be sent through the official website only. Selected candidates will be on probation for 1 year (extendable up to 2 years). Service conditions include attractive pay, perks, and career growth opportunities. IIFCL reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage.
